caption: The video features a woman sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast recording for "Boss Talk 101." She is wearing headphones and a green t-shirt with the podcast's logo on it. The setting appears to be a professional studio environment, with a backdrop displaying the podcast's branding and images of other individuals associated with the show. The woman seems engaged and possibly smiling as she speaks into the microphone, suggesting an interactive and lively discussion. A framed picture and a cup are visible on the table next to her, adding to the casual yet professional atmosphere of the recording session.
